operation.Node: entry:0 %empty = call i32 (...)* @_ssdm_op_SpecInterface(float* %f5, [8 x i8]* @ap_fifo_str, i32 0, i32 0, [1 x i8]* @p_str, i32 0, i32 0, [1 x i8]* @p_str, [1 x i8]* @p_str, [1 x i8]* @p_str, i32 2, i32 2, i32 16, i32 16, [1 x i8]* @p_str, [1 x i8]* @p_str)
